data.title: OpenEvidence and Tandem Partner to Streamline Evidence-Based Prescribing and Prior Authorizations
data.description: In Miami and New York, a company called OpenEvidence is revolutionizing clinical decision-making with evidence-based solutions, while Tandem is streamlining the process from prescription to patient care. This partnership aims to enhance medical practices by leveraging data-driven insights and automated workflows.

data.description: The latest report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, a decrease of 0.2% compared to last month. It also shows that the economy added 200,000 new jobs in various industries. The labor force participation rate remains stable at 62.7%. Additionally, the average hourly earnings have increased by 2.8% year-over-year. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the job market and economic growth, providing a promising outlook for the future.

data.title: Management Controls Announced as 2026 CIO 100 Award Winner
data.description: In Houston, Foundry's Chief Information Officer has announced Management Controls, Inc. (MCi) as a recipient of the prestigious 2026 CIO 100 Award. This award, which has been acknowledging innovative organizations for over four decades, highlights those demonstrating exceptional strategic and operational excellence in information technology. Richard Smith, the Head of Event Content for CIO 100 Awards & Conference, emphasized that this year's awardees are not only maintaining operations but also advancing the business with technologies such as AI, data, security, and cloud.

data.title: Corvias Launches $11 Million Resilient Flooring Program Across Six U.S. Army Installations
data.description: In Warwick, Rhode Island, Corvias and its Army partners have revealed a significant investment of more than $11 million in enhancing military family homes. This initiative involves replacing carpets with robust hard surface flooring in close to 1,000 residences across six different locations. The extensive six-year project will take place at Aberdeen Proving Ground, Fort Rucker, Fort Sill, Fort Meade, Fort Riley, and Fort Bragg. The primary objectives of this modernization effort are to prolong the lifespan of the properties, decrease maintenance expenses, and offer better housing conditions for Soldiers and their families.

data.title: Forest Road Launches CenterNode, with up to $750 Million in Capital Commitments from Institutional Investors, including Liberty Mutual Investments
data.description: Forest Road has introduced CenterNode with a potential sum of $750 million in capital commitments aimed at funding renewable energy projects in the United States. Liberty Mutual Investments is among the investors backing this initiative.

data.title: NVIDIA's GH200 achieves 4.6 microseconds in trading benchmark, challenging FPGA's in algorithmic trading with record inference times.
data.description: The Grace Hopper Superchip from NVIDIA has achieved unprecedented single-digit microsecond inference times in the STAC-ML benchmark. This breakthrough challenges FPGA's dominant position in algorithmic trading.

data.title: MAPEI’s Luigi Di Geso Receives NTCA’s 2026 Joe A. Tarver Award at Coverings
data.description: In Deerfield Beach, Florida, MAPEI Corporation revealed that Luigi Di Geso, President and CEO of MAPEI North America, received the Joe A. Tarver Service to the Industry Award for 2026 from the National Tile Contractors Association. The award was presented during Coverings 2026, after the Gary Sinise keynote address, a function supported by MAPEI. This distinguished honor is bestowed upon one individual in the U.S. industry each year.

data.title: Lautenbach Recycling Expands in Bellingham with New Regional Recycling Facility
data.description: The inauguration of a new recycling and materials recovery facility in Bellingham by Lautenbach Recycling has been revealed. This expansion aims to enhance the company's capacity to cater to businesses, contractors, and residents in Northwest Washington. Situated at 2885 E..., the facility is part of the company's strategic efforts to broaden its services and reach in the region.

data.title: BULDAK RETURNS AS THE OFFICIAL INSTANT NOODLE AND HOT SAUCE PARTNER OF THE 2026 COACHELLA VALLEY MUSIC AND ARTS FESTIVAL
data.description: Samyang Foods has announced their continued partnership for the second year with a Flavor-First Festival-Week program in Los Angeles. The event will focus on food, creator storytelling, and fan participation. Buldak will return as the Official Ramen and Hot Sauce for the event. The program will feature various activities and events to engage fans, with the goal of promoting the brand and its products. The festival is set to take place on April 2, 2026, and is expected to draw a large crowd, building on the success of the previous year.
